antipattern.description: Service test mocks every dependency it calls.
antipattern.reason: Tests verify mocks, not behaviour. Refactors that break implementation but keep the mock contract slip through.

antipattern.description: `from django.test import Client` used to test DRF endpoints.
antipattern.reason: Content negotiation wrong, auth doesn't flow, body parsing inconsistent.
Field rename breaks 40 tests; defaults duplicated 40 times.
Tests 5x slower; suite goes from 3min to 15min for the same coverage.

antipattern.description: DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE inferred from env at test time.
antipattern.reason: CI uses production settings; tests leak into prod DB. Hard error.
